sub_dimension.onet_category_definition: A tendency to proactively pursue excellence through setting high standards, engaging in continuous learning, and persisting and adapting in the face of challenges and uncertainty at work.

items.definition: A tendency to be inventive, to be imaginative, and to adopt new perspectives on ways to accomplish work.

score_guidance.low_1_2: 从不主动创新，依赖既有方案
score_guidance.mid_3_4: 偶有创新尝试，能提出改进建议
score_guidance.high_5_6: 持续输出创新方案，主动重构流程

result.evidence: 负责用户增长中台从0到1建设；搭建分层补贴模型，区分新客首单、沉默唤醒、价格敏感型三层用户；推动北极星+二级指标树治理，发布口径字典216条；方案沉淀为增长补贴策略SOP v2.1并在3条业务线复用

items.definition: A tendency to establish and maintain personally challenging work-related goals, set high work-related standards, and exert high effort toward meeting those goals and standards.

score_guidance.low_1_2: 满足于现状，不主动设定挑战性目标
score_guidance.mid_3_4: 设定目标并完成，有基本责任心
score_guidance.high_5_6: 持续突破高标准，追求卓越表现
score_guidance.top_7: 以极高标准自我驱动，影响团队文化

result.evidence: 管理跨职能小组9人，承担需求优先级和里程碑管理；3个月内拉新成本下降18.7%，ROI从1.12提升到1.46；重点城市商家次月留存率提升9.4%；跨部门对齐效率提升，评审时长平均缩短32%；财务与增长团队月度复盘争议工单下降41%；推动客户成功团队采用风险等级干预清单，年度续费率提升6.8%

items.definition: A tendency to seek out and acquire new work-related knowledge and obtain a deep understanding of work-related subjects.

score_guidance.high_5_6: 深度研究、跨领域探索，有知识输出
